title: Boulder Co 4/9/18 Rest Day. Rode 10 Minutes. Knee Blown

enrichment.summary: Kyle is in Boulder, CO on a rest day after several days of training. He rode rollers for only 10 minutes before stopping due to a blown knee, and reflects on his minimal food intake for the day and physical soreness from recent efforts. He briefly mentions working on his website and plans to swim tomorrow instead.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Not worth it — stopped after 10 minutes because pushing through is just going to make the injury worse
Reluctant to take them — had to force himself to stop even with a painful knee
Wants to add explanatory content to his pages but needs to be mentally sharp enough to do it properly
